fields.name: flight_number
fields.doc: Denormalised flight number for fast lookup (VARCHAR 10)

fields.name: complaint_date
fields.doc: Complaint submission timestamp as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ)

fields.name: category
fields.doc: Top-level complaint category, e.g. Baggage, Flight Delay, Customer Service (VARCHAR 50)

fields.name: severity
fields.doc: Complaint severity: Low | Medium | High | Critical (VARCHAR 20)

fields.name: status
fields.doc: Resolution status: Open | Under Review | Resolved | Closed | Escalated (VARCHAR 20)

fields.name: assigned_agent
fields.doc: Agent assigned to resolve the complaint (VARCHAR 100, nullable)

fields.name: resolution_notes
fields.doc: Free-text resolution summary written by agent (VARCHAR 4000, nullable)

fields.name: resolution_date
fields.doc: Resolution timestamp as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ, nullable)

fields.name: satisfaction_score
fields.doc: Post-resolution CSAT score in range 1.0-5.0 (DECIMAL(2,1), nullable)
